title: Joe Dispenza: Cult or Scientist? Reviewing the Receipts
title_es: Joe Dispenza: ¿culto o científico? Revisando los recibos
description: Joe Dispenza built a 9-figure empire on a story of self-healed paralysis. We examined his published studies, the IRB review of his retreats, and the heart-coherence claims attributed to HeartMath. Where the evidence holds, where it doesn't, and how to read his work without pretending it's peer review.
description_es: Joe Dispenza construyó un imperio de 9 cifras sobre la historia de su parálisis auto-curada. Examinamos sus estudios publicados, la revisión IRB de sus retiros y las afirmaciones de coherencia cardíaca atribuidas a HeartMath. Dónde la evidencia se sostiene, dónde no, y cómo leer su trabajo sin pretender que es revisión por pares.
author: Alejandro del Palacio
imageAlt: Dark 1980s observation chamber, lone back-turned figure facing a vintage curved CRT portal showing a high-contrast multicolor split-anatomical figure — left half radiant gold healing aura levitating, right half X-ray spinal column with crimson injury point — miracle vs methodology breaking through the dark matrix
imagePrompt: Retrofuturist 1980s cinematic still photograph. Dark observation chamber dominates 70 percent of the frame in deep pitch-black with heavy film grain. On the right side: a large vintage curved CRT cathode-ray screen or glowing rectangular portal showing a HIGH-CONTRAST SATURATED MULTICOLOR scene that resonates with the duality of self-healing — a classical anatomical figure split vertically down the middle, the left half radiating warm golden healing aura levitating against a soft luminous background, the right half rendered as a clinical X-ray spinal column with crimson red injury point glowing at L1-L5 vertebrae against a deep blue clinical scan background, the two halves divided by a thin vertical line of crimson light. The screen/portal is the ONLY chromatic zone — vibrantly breaking out of the dark matrix with saturated gold + crimson + electric blue contrast. A small solitary back-turned silhouette of a figure in burgundy 1980s attire stands in the foreground observing the screen, dwarfed by the portal's glow. Vintage analog control panel with faint scattered yellow LED indicators in the deep shadow foreground. Heavy cinematic 35mm film grain, anamorphic lens flare, faint VHS scanline overlay, kodak ektachrome retro slide aesthetic. Mood: Tron 1982 + Stanley Kubrick 2001 + Tarkovsky Stalker + Apple 1984 commercial. The dark room is the matrix; the multicolor split-figure inside the portal is the healed-vs-published duality escaping. No recognizable face. Mysterious retrofuturist forensic mood. Photographic NOT painterly NOT illustrated.

medicalEntities.name: Chiropractic Medicine
medicalEntities.description: A licensed healthcare profession focused on musculoskeletal and spinal disorders. Distinct from neuroscience and medical research credentials.

medicalEntities.name: Salivary Immunoglobulin A (SIgA)
medicalEntities.description: Mucosal immune marker measured in Church et al. 2022 Frontiers in Psychology RCT. 49.5% median increase observed in experimental group (n=117 of 299, p=0.01).
medicalEntities.studyEvidence: Church et al. 2022, Frontiers in Psychology, n=513 RCT, biological measures from 117 of 299 experimental participants

medicalEntities.name: SERPINA5 (Serine Protease Inhibitor A5)
medicalEntities.description: Candidate protective protein elevated in experienced meditators vs controls. Identified in Zuniga-Hertz et al. 2023 as potentially inhibiting pseudotyped SARS-CoV-2 cell entry.
medicalEntities.studyEvidence: Zuniga-Hertz et al. 2023, Brain Behavior & Immunity – Health, n=111

medicalEntities.name: Heart Rate Variability (HRV) Coherence
medicalEntities.description: A physiological state in which heart rhythm becomes relatively harmonic at ~0.1 Hz, showing synchronization between respiration, blood pressure rhythms, and heart rate. Measured by HeartMath Institute. 75% accuracy detecting discrete emotional states via neural network analysis.
medicalEntities.studyEvidence: McCraty et al. 2016, HeartMath Institute Science of the Heart Vol. 2

medicalRiskFactors.name: Unvalidated medical claims from self-help retreats
medicalRiskFactors.description: Documented risk: at least one case of a person with pancreatic cancer considering stopping chemotherapy based on Dispenza retreat marketing. Preliminary meditation science marketed as a validated alternative to medical treatment before independent replication exists.

researchSources: Dispenza et al. 2023 — week-long retreat brainwave changes (publication review)
HeartMath Institute — heart-rate coherence original methodology
Bhasin et al. 2018 — relaxation response gene expression (often cited adjacent)
Beauregard et al. — fMRI mystical experience baselines
seoTitle: Joe Dispenza Evidence Review: HeartMath, IgA, RCT Audit (2026)
seoTitle_es: Revisión de evidencia de Joe Dispenza: HeartMath, IgA, auditoría RCT (2026)
seoDescription: What the peer-reviewed record actually says about Joe Dispenza's meditation method — the IgA paper, the SERPINA5 claim, and the audit of every published study.
seoDescription_es: Lo que el registro revisado por pares realmente dice del método de meditación de Joe Dispenza — el paper de IgA, la afirmación SERPINA5 y la auditoría de cada estudio publicado.
bluf: Joe Dispenza's self-healed-paralysis origin story is unverified and inconsistent with standard medical literature on his stated diagnosis. His retreat studies (Vieten et al. 2020, IONS-collaborated) report psychological improvements but lack control groups. The heart-coherence claims attributed to HeartMath have some peer-reviewed support. The 'consciousness collapses the wave function' physics claim does not. The empire is real; the evidence base is mixed and overclaimed by the brand.
bluf_es: La historia de origen de auto-curación de parálisis de Joe Dispenza no está verificada y es inconsistente con la literatura médica estándar sobre su diagnóstico declarado. Sus estudios de retiros (Vieten et al. 2020, colaboración IONS) reportan mejoras psicológicas pero carecen de grupos de control. Las afirmaciones de coherencia cardíaca atribuidas a HeartMath tienen algo de respaldo revisado por pares. La afirmación física de que 'la consciencia colapsa la función de onda' no lo tiene. El imperio es real; la base de evidencia es mixta y sobrevalorada por la marca.
